text.tspan: UNPRECEDENTED
@unhappychoice unleashes a storm of 18 dependency bumps, sweeping clean through 5 repos in one week!
DEVELOPING
@unhappychoice pushes 263 commits, a new winget package lands, and the dev community applauds.
SOURCES SAY
@unhappychoice resolves 17 PRs, proving that maintenance can be heroic.
KEYBOARD ON FIRE
@unhappychoice’s 93 commits on June 6th could power a small city—if only we had a power plant!
JUST IN
@unhappychoice releases mdts v0.20.3, fixing syntax bugs that had haunted developers for months.
ABSOLUTE CARNAGE
@unhappychoice deletes 2225 lines of legacy code while adding 5654 new lines—cleaning up more than cleaning!
NO SURVIVORS
@unhappychoice bounces between repos, leaving a trail of upgraded packages and satisfied maintainers.
UNPRECEDENTED

@unhappychoice pushes 263 commits, a new winget package lands, and the dev community applauds.
SOURCES SAY
@unhappychoice resolves 17 PRs, proving that maintenance can be heroic.
KEYBOARD ON FIRE
@unhappychoice’s 93 commits on June 6th could power a small city—if only we had a power plant!
JUST IN
@unhappychoice releases mdts v0.20.3, fixing syntax bugs that had haunted developers for months.
ABSOLUTE CARNAGE
@unhappychoice deletes 2225 lines of legacy code while adding 5654 new lines—cleaning up more than cleaning!
NO SURVIVORS
@unhappychoice bounces between repos, leaving a trail of upgraded packages and satisfied maintainers.
